def positive_flask_global_db_connection_per_request():
    rule_id = "flask_global_db_connection_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flask views create database connections per request instead of using pooled or app-scoped access."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
